title: Programmer Art Mushrooms for Turquoise3D (and Extra)
description: The different mushroom shapes between Updated and Programmer Art breaks the model, and this fixes it for ProgArt users!
body:
A simple add-on for Turquoise3D and the Extra add-on that fixes the models to fit with the older mushroom shapes.

Remember to pick the correct version when downloading!If you only use Turquoise3D, download the T3D version; if you use both Turquoise3D and Turquoise3D Extra, download the T3D Extra version.
